stage_7_6.summary: Money confirm-flow, agentLoop blocks 3-6, maximize sizing, and the complete Telegram candidate/deploy/close cluster are live through Patch 29 and Plugin 70.

adaptations_minimal: Telegram sessionHistory is plugin-owned and capped at 20 messages verbatim. TTY/REPL history remains separate by accepted owner decision.
Recovery path: re-unify Plugin 70 history with core state when index.js exports a stable session-history facade in a later phase.
Patch 28 marks an early hook pass. Plugin 70 consumes only confirm: callbacks there; ordinary text defers to Patch 03b after the busy queue, where intent routing wins before vanilla fallback.
Runtime dependency injection exists only as the __test seam; production defaults bind the real imported functions.
stage_7_6.hook_contract: telegram:command now has two phases for applicable input: ctx.early=true before the busy queue for callback completion, then the existing normal Patch-03b pass for ordinary text. Earlier handled contexts remain authoritative.
baseline_deltas: recordLlmCost is always-on and fail-open after each response with usage; this is a permanent non-option default delta.
GENERAL default maxTokens changes from vanilla 4096 to generalMaxTokens 8192; this is a permanent transport delta.
stage_7_6.parity_contract: Vanilla parity applies only when onConfirmRequired=null, allowNoToolFinal=false, and maxOutputTokens=null: the option-controlled paths remain dormant. The two baseline_deltas above are explicitly excluded.
